title: Ancient Beginnings | Fossil Starters for Cobblemon
description: A Cobblemon addon that replaces the classic starters with Fossil Pokemon! Includes improved IVs and an archaeologist's starter kit!
body:
# Ancient Beginnings

Ancient Beginnings is a **Cobblemon addon** that replaces the standard starter selection with **all available Fossil Pokémon.**


## Main Features

- Replaces Cobblemon’s default starters with **Fossil Pokémon**
- Improves starter IVs so that each IV has a minimum roll of 15. This is configurable in the mods config file
- After selection, it immediately gives players an Archeology Kit that includes;
  - 1 Brush
  - 10 Ancient Poke Balls
  - 3 Tumblestones


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## Choose your Fossil Pokémon by region!

### Kanto
- Kabuto
- Omanyte
- Aerodactyl

### Hoenn
- Lileep
- Anorith

### Sinnoh
- Cranidos
- Shieldon

### Unova
- Tirtouga
- Archen

### Kalos
- Tyrunt
- Amaura

### Galar
- Dracozolt
- Arctozolt
- Dracovish
- Arctovish


</details>


## Required Dependency

This mod requires **Cobblemon** to be installed separately. I am not affiliated with Cobblemon in any way.

## Thanks to the Cobblemon Team!

Special thanks to the team behind Cobblemon. I love their work, and I am so grateful to them for making such a great mod and for making it open-source so that creators like me can learn from them!
